title: The gen AI Kool-Aid tastes like eugenics
description:
Like many people, director Valerie Veatch was intrigued when OpenAI first released its Sora text-to-video generative AI model to the public in 2024. Though she didn't fully understand the technology, she was curious about what it could do, and she saw that other artists were building online communities to share their new AI creations. The hope of connecting with people drew Veatch into the AI space, but once she was there, she was shocked to see how often the technology would generate images dripping with racism and sexism.
Veatch was even more unsettled by the way her new AI-enthusiast peers did not seem to care that the machine they ralli …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 영화감독 발레리 비치는 2024년 OpenAI의 Sora 출시 후 생성형 AI에 관심을 갖게 되었지만, AI가 생성하는 인종차별적·성차별적 이미지에 충격을 받았습니다. AI 커뮤니티 내에서 이러한 문제에 대한 무관심한 태도를 목격했습니다. 생성형 AI 기술의 편향성 문제와 사회적 책임에 대한 우려를 제기하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Director Valerie Veatch became interested in generative AI after OpenAI's Sora release in 2024 but was shocked by the racist and sexist images the technology generated. She witnessed indifference toward these issues within AI enthusiast communities. The article raises concerns about bias in generative AI technology and social responsibility.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드가 AI 생성 콘텐츠를 활용할 때는 편향성과 차별적 요소를 사전에 검토하고 필터링하는 시스템을 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands using AI-generated content must establish systems to review and filter potential bias and discriminatory elements before deployment.
key_points: AI-generated content shows racist and sexist bias
Community indifference to AI bias issues
Need for ethical AI implementation
Social responsibility in AI adoption

title: Gemini task automation is slow, clunky, and super impressive
description:
An AI assistant that can actually get things done.	

I've been testing out Gemini's new task automation on the Pixel 10 Pro and the Galaxy S26 Ultra, which for the first time lets Gemini take the wheel and use apps for you. It's limited to a small subset right now - a handful of food delivery and rideshare services - and it's still in beta. It's slow, it's clunky at times, and it doesn't solve any serious problem you had using your phone. But it's impressive as hell, and I don't think it's hyperbole to say this is a glimpse of the future. We're still a long way off, but this is the first time I've seen a true AI assistant actually working on a phone - not in a keynote presentation or a careful …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 구글의 Gemini AI가 Pixel 10 Pro와 Galaxy S26 Ultra에서 앱을 직접 조작할 수 있는 작업 자동화 기능을 베타로 출시했습니다. 현재 음식 배달과 차량 호출 서비스에 제한되어 있으며 속도가 느리고 때로 부자연스럽지만 매우 인상적입니다. 진정한 AI 어시스턴트의 미래를 엿볼 수 있는 기술로 평가됩니다.
summary_en: Google's Gemini AI launched beta task automation features on Pixel 10 Pro and Galaxy S26 Ultra, allowing direct app manipulation. Currently limited to food delivery and rideshare services, it's slow and sometimes clunky but highly impressive. This represents a glimpse into the future of true AI assistants.
so_what_ko: AI 자동화 기술이 발전하면 D2C 브랜드는 고객의 주문부터 배송까지 전 과정을 AI가 처리하는 완전 자동화된 쇼핑 경험을 제공할 수 있게 됩니다.
so_what_en: As AI automation advances, D2C brands will be able to offer fully automated shopping experiences where AI handles everything from ordering to delivery.
key_points: AI can directly control smartphone apps
Limited to delivery and rideshare services currently
Technology is slow but shows future potential
First working AI assistant on mobile devices

title: Google Search is now using AI to replace headlines
description:
Since roughly the turn of the millennium, Google Search has been the bedrock of the web. People loved Google's trustworthy "10 blue links" search experience and its unspoken promise: The website you click is the website you get.
Now, Google is beginning to replace news headlines in its search results with ones that are AI-generated. After doing something similar in its Google Discover news feed, it's starting to mess with headlines in the traditional "10 blue links," too. We've found multiple examples where Google replaced headlines we wrote with ones we did not, sometimes changing their meaning in the process.
For example, Google reduced  …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 구글이 검색 결과에서 뉴스 헤드라인을 AI로 생성한 것으로 교체하기 시작했습니다. 기존의 '10개 파란 링크' 검색 경험에서 헤드라인의 의미가 변경되는 사례들이 발견되고 있습니다. 이는 구글 디스커버에 이어 전통적인 검색 결과에서도 적용되는 변화입니다.
summary_en: Google has started replacing news headlines in search results with AI-generated ones. Multiple examples show Google changing headlines from their original versions, sometimes altering their meaning. This follows similar changes in Google Discover and now extends to traditional '10 blue links' search results.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI가 헤드라인을 변경할 가능성을 고려해 SEO 전략을 재검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need to reconsider SEO strategies accounting for AI's potential to alter headlines in search results.
key_points: Google replacing original headlines with AI-generated ones
Changes occurring in traditional search results beyond Discover
Potential meaning alterations in AI-rewritten headlines
Impact on web publisher control over their content presentation

title: Amazon is making an Alexa phone
description:
Over 10 years after shelving the Fire Phone, Amazon is reportedly planning to launch another smartphone, this time focused on Alexa. According to Reuters, the phone, which is code-named "Transformer," will center around Amazon's AI assistant, but Alexa won't "necessarily be the primary operating system of the phone." 
"Transformer" is currently in development in Amazon's ZeroOne group, led by J Allard, who previously worked on the Zune and Xbox at Microsoft. Allard's team has reportedly explored both smartphone and "dumbphone" designs, taking inspiration from the $700 minimalist Light Phone, which features a black-and-white display and lack …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 아마존이 파이어폰 단종 10년 후 알렉사 중심의 새로운 스마트폰 개발을 계획하고 있습니다. '트랜스포머'라는 코드명의 이 기기는 AI 어시스턴트에 중점을 두지만 알렉사가 주 운영체제는 아닐 예정입니다. 마이크로소프트 출신 J 알라드가 이끄는 ZeroOne 그룹에서 개발 중입니다.
summary_en: Amazon is planning to launch a new smartphone focused on Alexa over 10 years after discontinuing the Fire Phone. Code-named 'Transformer,' the device will center around Amazon's AI assistant but Alexa won't necessarily be the primary operating system. It's being developed by Amazon's ZeroOne group led by former Microsoft executive J Allard.
so_what_ko: AI 어시스턴트 중심의 디바이스 트렌드가 확산되면서 D2C 브랜드도 음성 커머스 전략을 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: As AI assistant-centered devices trend grows, D2C brands should strengthen their voice commerce strategies for emerging platforms.
key_points: Amazon developing Alexa-focused smartphone after 10+ years
Code-named 'Transformer' with AI assistant as centerpiece
Led by former Microsoft Xbox/Zune executive J Allard
Exploring both smartphone and minimalist phone designs

title: Week of March 9 Cable News Ratings: Viewership Drops
description: Fox News remained the most-watched cable news network.
summary_ko: 3월 9일 주간 케이블 뉴스 시청률에서 전체적인 시청률 하락이 나타났습니다. 폭스 뉴스가 가장 많이 시청된 케이블 뉴스 네트워크로 남아있습니다. 구체적인 시청률 수치나 하락 원인은 원문에서 확인되지 않음.
summary_en: Cable news viewership dropped during the week of March 9th according to ratings data. Fox News remained the most-watched cable news network despite the overall decline. Specific viewership numbers and causes for the drop are not confirmed in the source.
so_what_ko: 전통 미디어 시청률 하락 트렌드를 고려해 D2C 브랜드는 디지털 퍼스트 마케팅 전략을 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Given traditional media viewership decline trends, D2C brands should strengthen digital-first marketing strategies.
key_points: Overall cable news viewership decline in March 9th week
Fox News maintained top position among cable networks
Traditional media consumption patterns shifting

title: How an Air Force Stint in South Korea Helped Make Chuck Norris a Uniquely American Brand
description: Chuck Norris, the martial-arts meister turned actor—and, later in life, entrepreneur and ambassador for brands from Toyota to Glock—died on March 19 in Hawaii. He was 86. While Norris never […]
summary_ko: 척 노리스가 3월 19일 하와이에서 86세로 사망했다고 발표되었습니다. 무술가에서 배우로, 이후 기업가이자 토요타부터 글록까지 다양한 브랜드의 앰배서더로 활동했습니다. 한국에서의 공군 복무 경험이 그를 독특한 미국적 브랜드로 만드는 데 기여했습니다.
summary_en: Chuck Norris, the martial arts expert turned actor and later entrepreneur, died on March 19 in Hawaii at age 86. He served as brand ambassador for various companies from Toyota to Glock throughout his career. His Air Force service in South Korea helped establish him as a uniquely American brand figure.
so_what_ko: 유명인의 개인적 경험과 스토리가 브랜드 가치 형성에 미치는 영향을 보여주는 사례로, D2C 브랜드들도 창립자나 브랜드 스토리의 진정성을 활용한 마케팅 전략을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: This demonstrates how personal experiences and authentic storytelling can build brand value, suggesting D2C brands should leverage founder stories and authentic narratives in their marketing strategies.
key_points: Chuck Norris transitioned from martial artist to actor to brand ambassador
His Air Force service in Korea contributed to his American brand identity
Personal experiences can become powerful brand-building elements

title: NCAA Women’s Tournament Ads ‘Well Sold’ With Record $1.5 Million for 30-Second Spot
description: Disney and ESPN achieve new highs for women's tournament ad sales, with pricing up double digits percent-wise.
summary_ko: NCAA 여자 농구 토너먼트 광고가 기록적인 성과를 거두며 30초 광고 슬롯이 150만 달러에 판매되었습니다. 디즈니와 ESPN이 여자 토너먼트 광고 판매에서 새로운 최고치를 달성했습니다. 광고 가격이 두 자릿수 퍼센트로 상승했다고 보고되었습니다.
summary_en: The NCAA Women's Tournament achieved record advertising revenue with 30-second spots selling for $1.5 million. Disney and ESPN reached new highs in women's tournament ad sales performance. Ad pricing increased by double-digit percentages compared to previous periods.
so_what_ko: 여성 스포츠의 광고 가치 상승은 D2C 브랜드들이 여성 중심 콘텐츠와 이벤트에 대한 마케팅 투자를 늘릴 기회를 시사합니다.
so_what_en: The rising advertising value of women's sports presents opportunities for D2C brands to increase marketing investments in female-focused content and events.
key_points: 30-second ad spots reached record $1.5 million price point
Ad pricing increased by double-digit percentages
Women's sports content showing strong advertising demand

title: Week of March 9 Evening News Ratings: Networks Have Week-to-Week Declines
description: CBS Evening News falls below 4 million total viewers for the week.
summary_ko: 3월 9일 주간 저녁 뉴스 시청률이 주간 대비 하락세를 보였습니다. CBS 이브닝 뉴스가 해당 주간 총 시청자 400만 명 이하로 떨어졌습니다. 전체 네트워크들이 전주 대비 시청률 감소를 경험했습니다.
summary_en: Evening news ratings for the week of March 9 showed week-to-week declines across networks. CBS Evening News fell below 4 million total viewers for the week. All major networks experienced viewership decreases compared to the previous week.
so_what_ko: 전통 미디어 시청률 감소는 D2C 브랜드들이 디지털 및 스트리밍 플랫폼으로 광고 예산을 재배치해야 할 필요성을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Declining traditional media viewership indicates D2C brands should reallocate advertising budgets toward digital and streaming platforms.
key_points: All major networks experienced week-to-week rating declines
CBS Evening News dropped below 4 million viewers
Traditional broadcast viewership continues downward trend

title: Ticker: Layoffs Hit CBS News Again, CBS News Radio Shuttered
description: NBC News to partner with Joanna Stern on tech coverage.
summary_ko: CBS 뉴스에서 다시 대규모 해고가 발생했으며 CBS 뉴스 라디오가 폐쇄되었습니다. NBC 뉴스가 기술 분야 커버리지를 위해 조안나 스턴과 파트너십을 체결했습니다. 전통 미디어 업계의 구조조정이 계속되고 있습니다.
summary_en: CBS News experienced another round of layoffs and shuttered CBS News Radio operations. NBC News partnered with Joanna Stern for enhanced technology coverage. The restructuring of traditional media organizations continues across the industry.
so_what_ko: 전통 미디어의 구조조정은 D2C 브랜드들에게 더 저렴한 광고 기회와 새로운 콘텐츠 파트너십 가능성을 제공할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Media restructuring may create more affordable advertising opportunities and new content partnership possibilities for D2C brands.
key_points: CBS News underwent additional layoffs and radio shutdown
NBC News formed technology coverage partnership
Traditional media continues industry-wide restructuring

title: Sprite reasserts cultural bona fides with global platform, brand refresh
description: To engage Gen Z, “It’s That Fresh” includes global partnerships across music, basketball, food, fashion and street culture.
summary_ko: 스프라이트가 글로벌 플랫폼과 브랜드 리프레시를 통해 문화적 정체성을 재확립하고 있습니다. 'It's That Fresh' 캠페인으로 Z세대 공략을 위해 음악, 농구, 음식, 패션, 스트리트 컬처 전반에 걸친 글로벌 파트너십을 진행합니다. 브랜드의 문화적 영향력 강화에 집중하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Sprite is reasserting its cultural identity through a global platform and brand refresh initiative. The 'It's That Fresh' campaign targets Gen Z through partnerships across music, basketball, food, fashion, and street culture. The brand is focusing on strengthening its cultural influence and relevance.
so_what_ko: 글로벌 브랜드의 문화적 파트너십 전략은 D2C 브랜드들이 특정 세대나 문화 그룹과의 연결을 위해 다양한 라이프스타일 영역에서 협업해야 함을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Global brand cultural partnership strategies demonstrate that D2C brands should collaborate across lifestyle sectors to connect with specific generations or cultural groups.
key_points: Sprite launched 'It's That Fresh' global campaign targeting Gen Z
Partnerships span music, basketball, food, fashion, and street culture
Brand refresh focuses on cultural relevance and authenticity
